name: Bean Curd and Coconut Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Chili, seeded, sliced into thin rounds
2 tablespoons Fresh basil and/or mint, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop lemongrass and bruise it with the flat of a cleaver.
2. Add Laos powder and bruised lemongrass to the coconut milk. Stir gently and bring to a boil.
3. Simmer for 10 minutes, then strain off the lemongrass.
4. Add tofu and stir into the stock.
5. Remove 2 cups of stock, dissolve miso in it, and return to the pot. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Add remaining ingredients (including chili rounds) and serve garnished with coriander. This is delicious with a bowl of Thai jasmine rice.
